text: Refund Policy Customers may request a full refund within 30 days of purchase. Refunds are processed to the original payment method within five business days of approval. Eligibility To be eligible, the product must be unused and the request must include the original order number. Annual plans: prorated refund after 30 days. Monthly plans: no partial-month refunds. Exceptions Digital goods marked as final sale are excluded from this policy, as are purchases made through third-party resellers.

provenance.prefix: Digital goods marked as final sale
